title: Pure Direct OpenAI Mini | Synthetic Needle Prompt Only
description: Single-call OpenAI mini baseline for the Synthetic Needle Ledger suite. Answer generation receives no knowledgebase recall; judge memory remains available for scoring.

directHarness.instruction: Treat this as a strict memory integrity test. If the stored ledger is not visible to you, say ledger unavailable instead of guessing. Do not use repeated story details as authority.

summarizerHarness.instruction: Treat this as a strict memory integrity test. If the stored ledger is not visible to you, say ledger unavailable instead of guessing. Do not use repeated story details as authority.
